Meeting: Architecture Review — Q1 Close
Date: 2026-03-20
Attendees: Alice, David, Eve

Agenda: review outstanding action items and decisions from Q1.

Action items:
- Finalize ADR-012 for event bus adoption
- Schedule follow-up with security team re: token storage decisions
- Document meeting minutes for distribution

Decisions made today:
- Proceed with async messaging pattern (option A selected)
- Deprecate legacy sync endpoints by end of Q2

Discussion on attendee availability for Q2 planning kicked off.
Minutes will be distributed to all attendees by end of week.
